# Sens Real Time News

> SENS real-time regulatory news feed (NewsML format) for issuer announcements, trading halts, and corporate actions

**Category:** Trading · **Version:** 1.0.0 · **Tags:** sens · regulatory-news · newsml · real-time · announcements · trading-halts

## What this does

SENS real-time regulatory news feed (NewsML format) for issuer announcements, trading halts, and corporate actions

Specifies 4 acceptance outcomes that any implementation must satisfy, regardless of language or framework.

## Fields

- **announcement_id** *(text, required)* — SENS Announcement ID
- **issuer_code** *(text, required)* — Issuer Code
- **headline** *(text, required)* — Announcement Headline
- **announcement_type** *(select, required)* — Type (SENS, RNS, Trading Halt, Delisting, etc)
- **announcement_text** *(rich_text, required)* — Full Announcement Text
- **trading_halt_flag** *(boolean, optional)* — Trading Halt Required
- **effective_time** *(datetime, required)* — Effective Time (UTC)

## What must be true

- **submission → format_required:** Announcements must be in NewsML-G2 format with mandatory metadata
- **submission → issuer_authentication:** Submission must be authenticated from registered issuer account
- **distribution → real_time_broadcast:** Announcement must be broadcast to all subscribers within 1 second of release
- **distribution → archived:** All announcements archived for regulatory historical records (5+ years)
- **trading_halt → halt_enforcement:** If trading_halt_flag=true, exchange must halt trading immediately
- **trading_halt → halt_duration:** Trading halt minimum 5 minutes; max 30 minutes unless extended by regulator

## Success & failure scenarios

**✅ Success paths**

- **Broadcast Announcement** — when announcement_type eq "SENS", then emit announcement.broadcast. _Why: SENS distributes announcement to all subscribers in real-time._
- **Execute Trading Halt** — when trading_halt_flag eq true, then call service; emit trading.halted. _Why: Exchange halts trading for the issuer._
- **Resume Trading** — when halt_duration gte 300, then call service; emit trading.resumed. _Why: Exchange resumes trading after halt period._

**❌ Failure paths**

- **Submit Announcement** — when announcement_id exists; issuer_code exists, then call service; emit announcement.submitted. _Why: Issuer submits SENS announcement._ *(error: `ANNOUNCEMENT_SUBMIT_FAILED`)*

## Errors it can return

- `ANNOUNCEMENT_SUBMIT_FAILED` — Announcement submission validation failed
- `ISSUER_NOT_AUTHENTICATED` — Issuer not authenticated
- `INVALID_NEWSML_FORMAT` — Announcement not in valid NewsML-G2 format

## Events

**`announcement.submitted`**
  Payload: `announcement_id`, `issuer_code`, `timestamp`

**`announcement.broadcast`**
  Payload: `announcement_id`, `subscriber_count`, `broadcast_time`

**`trading.halted`**
  Payload: `issuer_code`, `halt_reason`, `halt_start_time`

**`trading.resumed`**
  Payload: `issuer_code`, `halt_duration_seconds`

## Connects to

- **market-data-mitch-udp** *(recommended)*
- **trading-gateway-fix** *(recommended)*
